texto: There are checks and balances and broad separation of powers under the Constitution. Each organ of the State, i.e. the legislature, the executive and the judiciary, must have respect for the others and not encroach into each other's domain.
explicacao: Orientação direta de P. Sathasivam sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “There are checks and balances and broad separation of powers under the Constitution. Each organ o…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, constitution, separation, útil em momentos de viagem e separation.

texto: As a practising lawyer, I was mediocre, but I worked hard as a law officer of the state government and on the private side. After becoming a judge, I maintained a low profile in other activities and concentrated only on judicial work.
explicacao: Citação de P. Sathasivam sobre temas ligados a trabalho. “As a practising lawyer, I was mediocre, but I worked hard as a law officer of the state governmen…” articula trabalho, work, law em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e law.
